closes_when: A4 promotion-drill receipts pass (owner-scheduled GCP window)
Comfy revision below is pushed so the permalink resolves publicly (owner action)
roadmap golden_proof.publication flips from local_pending_m0 to published with the permalink

publication.revision_note: Local main commit; immutable once pushed. Adds byte-stability pinning on top of evidence commit e9f9fe3f787a013780aa54953df92a8952a467a4.

files.role: landing document binding evidence to the frozen release
sanitized publication copy of the gold run report
byte-identical copy of the run acceptance snapshot

provenance.redaction: Deployment public IPv4 replaced with <gcp-public-ip> in report.md (5 occurrences); no other content changed.
provenance.acceptance_snapshot: byte-identical to the raw original (same sha256)

byte_stability.mechanism: Comfy fieldlab/.gitattributes marks the hash-bound evidence set -text and the catalog was renormalized
byte_stability.reason: autocrlf had normalized the committed catalog blobs to LF, so a fresh checkout or the GitHub raw view would not reproduce the A3-recorded hashes.
byte_stability.verified: blob bytes == working-tree bytes == recorded sha256 for all six hash-bound files at the publication revision

passes: deterministic regex: SteamID64 (7656119 + 10 digits), credential-shaped key/token/password/bearer assignments, IPv4 literals, emails
independent semantic review (HEARTH-routed LLM) for Steam identity, credentials, network/personal identity, cloud resource identifiers
secret_scan.scope: published files at the publication revision

binding.catalog_gold_entry: fieldlab/runs/index.json lists exactly one gold run: the run published here

limitations: The revision is immutable only after it is pushed; if Comfy history is rewritten before push, this receipt must be re-recorded.
This receipt stages A5; it is not closing evidence until the A4 drill receipts pass and the permalink resolves publicly.
